_comment: Curated, verified open-license video for the Σ₀ research flywheel. Every entry is CC-BY / public-domain and fetched via yt-dlp (bounded to 480p / first 120s) then DELETED — only extracted features are kept. This is a RELIABLE seed so collection isn't hostage to live-search rate limits (Wikimedia throttles bulk fetches). The nightly also searches Wikimedia/Archive/PeerTube live on top of this list. Identifiers verified against archive.org/metadata.
